findings.problemShort: elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.solutionShort: ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets wcag 2 aa minimum contrast ratio thresholds
findings.solutionLong:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.46 (foreground color: #515661, background color: #14161a, font size: 10.5pt (14px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

issue.title: Accessibility issue: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds on /

findings.problemShort: all page content should be contained by landmarks
findings.solutionShort: ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
findings.solutionLong:
Fix any of the following:
  Some page content is not contained by landmarks

issue.title: Accessibility issue: All page content should be contained by landmarks on /
